---
title: 'Fuck this shit...'
date: '2016-11-12T22:10:00.0040000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3628455691718946962'
blogger_filename: '/2016/11/fuck-this-shit.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'FuckYou'
---

Didn't I say I was cleaning the car for Uber... like a week ago?<br />
<br />
She comes out to "comment" on the fact she's never seen me clean the car like this when it wasn't so I could go make money.<br />
<br />
She says she cleaned the car many times without a thank you.<br />
<br />
And this is supposed to be a productive conversation?<br />
<br />
How can I do to work, everyday, where I can do no wrong... Then come home where I can do no right. Fuck you! I'm leaving.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
